summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MomCareAI voice input/output features (Iteration 3). All backend APIs passing 100%. Voice UI elements successfully integrated without breaking existing functionality. Minor mobile overlay issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Made with Emergent badge overlay blocks some clicks on mobile viewport

passed_tests: Backend: All 23 API endpoints passing (100% success rate)
Voice input button (mic) renders correctly next to chat input
Voice output toggle button renders correctly in chat header
Speaker buttons render correctly next to AI message timestamps
Chat input and send functionality works correctly
Quick prompts work correctly in empty state (4 prompts functional)
High-risk warning banner displays correctly for chest pain mentions
Extracted data badges display correctly (symptoms, mood, sleep, water)
All navigation works correctly (Dashboard, Reminders, Report, Prescription)
Dashboard page loads with Med Adherence stats
Prescription page loads with analyze functionality
Voice features properly sized for mobile touch targets
